title: Project substrate config (degree-zero)
description: Self-bootstrapping config block. The config that configures the substrate is itself a typed schema-validated block. Fields: schema_version, root (substrate location, closes GitHub #3), naming (canonical-id → display-name aliases), hierarchy (constraint declarations for closure-table edges), lenses (named projections). Ships with the package as a framework-contract schema; user override at .project/schemas/config.schema.json supersedes per the SDK's three-tier schema resolution.

schema_version.description: Semver of this config schema. The meta-anchor for FGAP-006 schema versioning.

root.description: On-disk directory housing the substrate. Default '.project'. Closes GitHub issue #3 surface (folder placement). Note: until block-api retrofit lands, this field is captured but unconsumed by block-api readers.

naming.description: Canonical-id → user-facing-name alias map. Code references canonical ids; UI/macros render configured names. Decouples terminology from code.

hierarchy.description: Constraint declaration: which (parent_block, child_block, relation_type) edges are legal in relations.json. Not the closure-table data itself. Distinguishes hierarchy edges (parent ∈ canonical ids of parent_block) from lens edges (parent ∈ lens.bins).

parent_block.description: Canonical block id whose items may appear in edge.parent

child_block.description: Canonical block id whose items may appear in edge.child

relation_type.description: Edge label disambiguating this hierarchy from lens edges

lenses.description: Named projections over a target block. Each lens declares either a derived_from_field (auto-projection from existing item field) or relies on hand-curated edges in relations.json.

target.description: Canonical block id whose items are being projected

relation_type.description: Edge label in the closure table

derived_from_field.description: If set, edges synthesized at read-time from this field on each item. If null, edges read from relations.json.

bins.description: Ordered list of cluster names for rendering. Items not matching any bin go into an implicit (uncategorized) cluster.

render_uncategorized.description: Whether to render the (uncategorized) bucket of items not placed into any declared bin. Default true. Set false for curated final views.
